description.ko: 심해 생명체에 대한 평화로운 관찰을 담았으며, 심해의 압도적인 어둠 속에서 투명한 유기체들이 유일한 빛이 되어줍니다.
description.en: A peaceful observation of life in the deep ocean, where transparent organisms provide the only light in the crushing darkness of the abyss.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean floor, titled 'The Bioluminescent Current.' A massive swarm of #40E0D0 turquoise jellyfish with long, trailing #48D1CC cyan filaments drifts through the #000080 midnight-blue water. In the background, ancient #006994 hydrothermal vents release glowing thermal bubbles and shimmering marine snow. Photorealistic fluid dynamics and volumetric light rays filter through the high-pressure abyssal currents. Focus on the transparent, fragile grace of the deep-sea organisms and the peaceful silence of the trenches. 8k resolution, hyper-realistic underwater atmosphere.
